{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mellow Moon
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mellow Moon]] is one of the prisoner [[Advocates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
